key_risks: Mega-cap tech rebound would leave SPY benchmark hard to beat
Sticky inflation (CPI +4.2% YoY) could push yields higher, hurting TLT and small caps
Biotech momentum reversal after sharp run
Credit/risk-off event hitting small caps and high-beta biotech disproportionately

portfolio.rationale: Small caps showing relative strength amid tech selloff, positive momentum with +3.82% 30d.
Strong momentum factor (+8.73% 30d) likely to continue as leadership broadens.
XBI breaking out +11.78% 30d, +8.74% 7d signals sector rotation and risk appetite return.
Solid breadth participation, defensive cyclical with steady gains.
Hedge for equity drawdown; TLT positive 30d as rates likely peak with Fed at 3.50-3.75%.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward broadening market leadership (small caps, momentum, biotech) away from mega-cap tech which is under pressure from semis weakness. TLT provides duration hedge given softening data and Fed already cutting.
rationale_summary: Rotate away from mega-cap tech weakness into broadening leadership (small caps, momentum, biotech, industrials), with long Treasuries as hedge.
